description: Go stdlib-only change - statefulset error wrapping with only fmt standard library usage
rationale: Single file changed: pkg/controller/statefulset/stateful_pod_control.go (4 additions). Changes only fmt.Errorf format verbs from %s to %w for proper error wrapping. All imports are Go standard library (fmt) and internal k8s packages. No third-party library imports that map to any domain. Path classification: pkg/controller/ could be api or unknown. Semantic analysis: only stdlib imports, no domain-specific library signals. Falls back to path classification. 1 domain = PASS.
notes: Go standard library imports (fmt, context, etc.) should not trigger any domain classification. The semantic analyzer should recognize these as domain-neutral and yield no hints, letting path-based classification decide. Tests that Go stdlib is correctly treated as non-signal.
